zh-CN.name: 字母A
zh-CN.intro: A 是字母表里第一个字母。它像一座尖尖的小山，又像一把高高的梯子。我们一起来认识它吧！

story.title: 🔤 字母A的大冒险
story.body: 字母A是个勇敢的小尖帽。一天，它想去花园里找好朋友小蚂蚁（Ant）。小蚂蚁藏在叶子下面，A大声喊：“啊！蚂蚁在这里！”小蚂蚁爬出来，和A一起玩。它们爬上A的尖顶，像滑滑梯一样滑下来。小蚂蚁笑着说：“A真有趣，像个大帐篷！”它们一起数蚂蚁：一只、两只、三只。太阳落山了，A和小蚂蚁说再见，明天还要一起玩。字母A真开心，它有好多好朋友呢！

knowledge.title: A是什么字母？
knowledge.body: A 是很多宝宝最先认识的字母。它读作“ā”，像张开嘴巴发出的声音。在英文里，很多单词都以A开头，比如蚂蚁（Ant）、苹果（Apple）。

en.name: A
en.intro: A is the first letter of the alphabet. It looks like a pointy mountain or a tall ladder. Let's learn about it together!

story.title: 🔤 Letter A's Big Adventure
story.body: Letter A is a brave little pointy hat. One day, it wanted to find its good friend, Little Ant, in the garden. Little Ant was hiding under a leaf. A shouted loudly, "Ah! Ant is here!" Little Ant crawled out and played with A. They climbed up to the tip of A and slid down like a slide. Little Ant laughed, "A is so fun, just like a big tent!" They counted ants together: one, two, three. When the sun went down, A and Little Ant said goodbye, promising to play again tomorrow. Letter A was so happy to have many good friends!

knowledge.title: What is the letter A?
knowledge.body: A is often the first letter children learn. It makes the sound "ay," like when you open your mouth wide. Many words start with A, such as ant and apple.
